query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MIN(taskId) as first_id, MAX(taskId) as last_id FROM memory_context WHERE taskTitle LIKE '[资源存档]%';
SELECT taskId, taskTitle, importance, memoryType FROM memory_context WHERE taskTitle LIKE '[资源存档]%' ORDER BY taskId ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aCZfsD9brUWuDm.root --database Sfk3bwgkEZLNATmH8kTpez --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MIN(taskId) as first_id, MAX(taskId) as last_id FROM memory_context WHERE taskTitle LIKE '[资源存档]%';
SELECT taskId, taskTitle, importance, memoryType FROM memory_context WHERE taskTitle LIKE '[资源存档]%' ORDER BY taskId ASC;
